ticket.subject: Dispute charge
ticket.description:
I am messaging to say i am unaware of this charge taken out of my account.


My bank account is showing $49.91 please advise me on this as I wish delete and have a refund.

Belinda Edmonds

events.body:
Hello belinda,

Thank you for contacting us.

**According to our Terms of Service, we have canceled your subscription and issued a refund for the last monthly charge. Please allow up to 10 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.**

For your convenience, we’d like to provide a brief overview of the subscription terms. As outlined in our Terms of Service and your welcome email, the 7-day full-access membership automatically renews into a monthly membership. Recurring monthly charges are processed at the start of each new billing cycle.

If you have any additional questions or need further assistance, please feel free to reach out.

Kind regards,

John
Customer Support Specialist

Lovestyle.co
